info.description: Links a Keyword from Registry with optional overrides

coverage.description: Pick the Master Keyword from Registry

titleOverride.description: Leave empty to use Master Registry title

descriptionOverride.description: Leave empty to use Master Registry description

iconOverride.description: Leave empty to use Master Registry icon

limitOverride.description: e.g., Change 'Up to 5L' to 'Unlimited' for this specific plan

isIncluded.description: True if this keyword is part of the base plan price
